description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OctoBot-Tentacles-CI that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple OS (macos-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-latest), architectures (x64, x86), and Python types (sources, cython). For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.8, install OctoBot and its dependencies, compile the project if necessary, and run Pytests. Additionally, upload tentacles to a Nexus repository and notify Discord on failure.
